'''âd-ch-ng-d''' ('''kadachngedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immasculate|immasculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immasculate|immasculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ch-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kadachngedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidachngedoko|thidachngedoko]] || [[word:jidachngedoko|jidachngedoko]] || [[word:shidachngedoko|shidachngedoko]] || [[word:kidachngedoko|kidachngedoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
